items.text: Read context: session-creation-ux/decisions.md + state.md in full (Risks section, toggle/badge design, non-goals)
Read the actual frontend code: conversation-sidebar.tsx, chat-store.ts, chat-store/preferences.ts, chat-panel.tsx
Verify baseline: npx tsc --noEmit (7 pre-existing tools-panel errors only), npm test -- --run (82/84, same 2 pre-existing failures), cargo build + cargo test --lib (clean/206)
Design both items in decisions.md before implementing: persistence mechanism choice (in-memory vs localStorage) with rationale, chat header indicator placement/style/show-condition
Implement toggle persistence in conversation-sidebar.tsx / chat-store
Implement chat header mode indicator in chat-panel.tsx
Add/update frontend tests for both changes
Full verification: npx tsc --noEmit, npm test -- --run, cargo build, cargo test --lib

Manual/e2e verification: extended session-creation-ux.test.ts with a remount-persistence case (4/4 clean full-suite runs after fixing a pre-existing toggle-assertion race the new persistence write made more likely to surface); judged component tests sufficient for the header indicator; re-ran ask-user-loop.test.ts once, no regression
Update root/Squire/state.md Child Nodes list and root/Squire/handoff.md to reflect this session's work and remaining backlog
